text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, Agnes Digital and I are at a<n>ramen
restaurant, when...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: I-I finally got the chance to come here!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hyah! R-R-Rob Roy! At a ramen<n>restaurant! What a
rare sighting!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Let's see... page 257, shoyu...<n>ramen... here it is.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: E-excuse me... Ummm... Excuse me!

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text: I've got two orders of shio ramen!
choice_data_list: It looks like they didn't hear her.
It looks like they didn't hear her.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Hmmm?! It seems Rob Roy is in a<n>pickle!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Excuse me! Could you get her order<n>over there,
please?! I swear I'll never<n>ask you for anything
else ever again!

text_block_list.name: Staff
text_block_list.text:
Wh-whoa, that's quite a promise! I'll<n>get on it right
away!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
With Agnes Digital's help, Zenno Rob<n>Roy
manages to place her order.<n>However, not long
after...

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Let's see, it looks like it's best with<n>tons of
pepper... Oh? There's none on<n>the table...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Special delivery coming through!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Huh?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Whooosh!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Wh-what was that just—oh! There's<n>pepper now!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Mission accomplished! Please, take<n>your time and
savor the ramen...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Sigh... Stumbling upon Rob Royenjoying ramen... this is the result ofbuilding good karma.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Um... Digital?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Whaaa?! Rob Roy! Um, I... uh!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Thank you... for helping me out earlier.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Ah, um uh, I-I-I-I'm so sorry! Really, I<n>shouldn't
have stuck my nose in!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Not at all! It's thanks to you that I<n>was able to eat
the ramen I'd been<n>looking forward to.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
This book I'm reading has a scene<n>where the
main character eats ramen<n>the night before a
race... The<n>restaurant in the book is modeled<n>after
the one we just visited.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
I thought that if I could eat the same<n>thing as the
main character, maybe I<n>could run like her too...
Although it's<n>probably just wishful thinking.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: ...Rob Roy.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text: Y-yes?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: There's something I must tell you...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
You work hard day in and day out, all<n>in an
innocent chase for victory, as if<n>appealing to some
higher power.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
In my heart, you are already the main<n>character!
There's nothing more I<n>could ask for than to be of
help to<n>you!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Th-th-that makes me so happy! Just...<n>so very
happy...
choice_data_list: You're a main character too, Digital.
You're a main character too, Digital.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Th-th-that makes me so happy! Just...<n>so very
happy...
choice_data_list: You're a main character too, Digital.
You're a main character too, Digital.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: I only spoke what was honestly on<n>my mind.

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... I see. Anyway, I have to go,<n>but let's eat
ramen together<n>sometime.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: Yeah... Let's... do that?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Hwaaah! No way! Did one of my<n>oshis just invite
me to ramen?!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
The image of her glasses fogging up<n>as she blew
on her ramen is still<n>fresh in my head!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: And to think I've been offered thechance to behold her person againenjoying another steamy bowl! Mymouth is watering already... Drool!

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Love for Umamusume bursts from<n>within Agnes
Digital, just like always!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Whargh?! Wh-what are you saying?<n>I'm nothing
more than a supporter, a<n>mere pleb!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
But I... I don't really stand out either.<n>Hehe... We
may be birds of a feather.

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Wha?! Us? B-birds of a feather?!<n>Th-th-th-that's
far too immodest a<n>thought!

text_block_list.name: Zenno Rob Roy
text_block_list.text:
Oh, I'm so sorry! You must not like<n>being
compared to someone like me...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
No! I'm overjoyed that I can...<n>sh-share the same
feelings as....<n>y-y-y-y-y-y...

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Overwhelmed by conflicting emotions,<n>Agnes
Digital completely loses her<n>grip!
